spec.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trailer_input WHERE vin = '$Trailer'
SELECT make AS "MAKE", model as "MODEL", active AS "ACTIVE" FROM trailers WHERE vin='$Trailer'
SELECT "time" FROM trailer_loads WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT speed FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer'
SELECT odototal FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY odototal DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT odotrip FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY odototal DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT voltagebattery FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT satellitescount FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT datamode FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT currentbattery FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT voltagetrailer FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT event FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT priority FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT numofrecords FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT gsmsignal FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT imei FROM trailers WHERE vin='$Trailer'
SELECT servertime FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY servertime DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT speedsat FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer'
SELECT latitude, longitude FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer'
SELECT movement FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT ignitionstatus FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

/* FRAME HOT-SPOTS — top nodes by risk (uses trailer_feea) */
WITH src AS (
  SELECT NodeNumber::int AS node, VIN,
  COALESCE(Damage,0.0)::double precision AS dmg,
  COALESCE(UtilizationRatio,0.0)::double precision AS ur,
  COALESCE(EqStressRange,0.0)::double precision AS eqr,
  COALESCE(MinStress,0.0)::double precision AS smin,
  COALESCE(MaxStress,0.0)::double precision AS smax,
  COALESCE(MaxStressRrange,0.0)::double precision AS msr
  FROM trailer_fea WHERE VIN = '$Trailer'
  ),
  per_node AS (
    SELECT *,
    GREATEST(ur, dmg) AS risk_idx 
    FROM src)
SELECT node AS "Node", ROUND(risk_idx::numeric,3) AS "Risk",
CASE
WHEN ur >= 1.0 OR dmg >= 1.0 THEN 'Critical'
WHEN ur >= 0.90 OR dmg >= 0.70 THEN 'High'
WHEN ur >= 0.75 OR dmg >= 0.40 THEN 'Watch'
ELSE 'Normal'
END
AS "Status",
ROUND(ur::numeric,3) AS "UtilizationRatio",
ROUND(dmg::numeric,3) AS "Damage",
ROUND(eqr::numeric,1) AS "EqStressRange",
ROUND(smin::numeric,1) AS "MinStress",
ROUND(smax::numeric,1) AS "MaxStress",
ROUND(msr::numeric,1) AS "MaxStressRrange"
FROM per_node
ORDER BY risk_idx DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20

/* FRAME HOT-SPOTS — top nodes by risk (uses trailer_feea) */
WITH src AS (
  SELECT NodeNumber::int AS node, VIN, 
  COALESCE(Damage,0.0)::double precision AS dmg, 
  COALESCE(UtilizationRatio,0.0)::double precision AS ur,
  COALESCE(EqStressRange,0.0)::double precision AS eqr,
  COALESCE(MinStress,0.0)::double precision AS smin,
  COALESCE(MaxStress,0.0)::double precision AS smax,
  COALESCE(MaxStressRrange,0.0)::double precision AS msr 
  FROM trailer_fea
  WHERE VIN = '$Trailer'),
per_node AS (
  SELECT *, GREATEST(ur, dmg) AS risk_idx FROM src)
SELECT node AS "Node",
ROUND(risk_idx::numeric,3) AS "Risk",
CASE
WHEN ur >= 1.0 OR dmg >= 1.0 THEN 'Critical'
WHEN ur >= 0.90 OR dmg >= 0.70 THEN 'High'
WHEN ur >= 0.75 OR dmg >= 0.40 THEN 'Watch'
ELSE 'Normal'
END
AS "Status",
ROUND(ur::numeric,3) AS "UtilizationRatio",
ROUND(dmg::numeric,3) AS "Damage",
ROUND(eqr::numeric,1) AS "EqStressRange",
ROUND(smin::numeric,1) AS "MinStress",
ROUND(smax::numeric,1) AS "MaxStress",
ROUND(msr::numeric,1) AS "MaxStressRrange"
FROM per_node
ORDER BY risk_idx DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20

SELECT "time", VIN, fzkingpinnreal/1000 AS "Fz Kingpin (kN)"
FROM trailer_loads
WHERE VIN = '$Trailer'
-- AND $__timeFilter("time")
-- AND fzkingpinnreal BETWEEN -4e5 AND 4e5
ORDER BY "time"

SELECT "time", VIN, fxkingpinn/1000 AS "Fx Kingpin (kN)"
FROM trailer_loads
WHERE VIN = '$Trailer'
AND $__timeFilter("time")
AND LTRGroup BETWEEN -1 AND 1
AND fxkingpinn BETWEEN -25e4 AND 3e5
ORDER BY "time" DESC

spec.title: Torque around Trailer Axle System (Yaw Moment)

spec.rawSql:
SELECT "time", VIN, mzyawnm/1000 AS "Mz Yaw (kN·m)"
FROM trailer_loads
WHERE VIN = '$Trailer'
AND $__timeFilter("time")
AND LTRGroup BETWEEN -1 AND 1
--AND mzyawnm BETWEEN -5e5 AND 5e5
--AND xax1lm BETWEEN -1 AND 1 
--AND xax1rm BETWEEN -1 AND 1
--AND xax2lm BETWEEN -1 AND 1 
--AND xax2rm BETWEEN -1 AND 1
--AND xax3lm BETWEEN -1 AND 1 
--AND xax3rm BETWEEN -1 AND 1
ORDER BY "time"
SELECT abpreslhfront AS "Airbag Pressure Left Front", abpreslhrear AS "Airbag Pressure Left Rear" from trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer'
SELECT abpresrhfront AS "Airbag Pressure Right Front", abpresrhrear AS "Airbag Pressure Right Rear" from trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer'
SELECT statusloaded FROM trailer_loads WHERE vin='$Trailer'
SELECT vin FROM trailers LIMIT 50
